title: The Straw Hats Turn the Raid Around
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Kid, Unknown person #8, Momonosuke as The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.
scene: The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That day, we cried, laughed,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: And died alongside open-sama!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We are all ghosts. Hell-bent on fulfilling our master's dream!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We are not here merely out of a sense of duty!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Every last one of us...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...is fighting because of that emotional bond!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if it kills us, we won't be able to rest until we have seen this through!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Tonight Will Mark The End of Orochi and Kaido's Reign!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There will be a brilliant new dawn tomorrow with MOMONOSUKE as Shogun!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Third Floor

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hawkins!! You bastard!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How many meat shields do you have left?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Huff... huff...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Killer vs Hawkins

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not too many...I'm really starting to sweat here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hehe he...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I really feel for ya!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I may not have many left,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...but you should consider...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...whose life is currently standing in for mine!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Second Floor

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Hey! What's wrong?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Law 8 kid vs big mom

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: Eustass- Ya?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ERRY...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What the hell?! Something stabbed me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Your strawman!! You didn't...?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have to admit, it would've been fun to watch you unknown-ingly kill kid,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But seeing you agonize over fighting back should be amusing too, don't you think?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you find a way to kill me,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You will just be murdering your own captain!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now then... let's see how you choose to entertain me!! I know you'll try your best!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: FA FAFA!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You sure have a twisted sense of humor!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 34 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
